name: La Mariana Sailing Club
tagline: Hawaii's original tiki bar since 1957 — hidden in an industrial marina with museum-worthy tiki artifacts and strong mai tais.
talkStory: Annette Nahinu La Mariana opened this marina bar in 1957 and spent decades rescuing tiki artifacts from demolished restaurants -- puffer fish lamps from Trader Vic's original Oakland location, rattan from Don the Beachcomber, carvings from the Hilton's Tapa Room. She passed away in 2012 but her irreplaceable collection remains intact. Quentin Tarantino and Bill Murray have both made pilgrimages here. The Friday night live music with ukulele singalongs feels frozen in 1962.
